name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: At 6470 S 12th Ave in Tucson, AZ, PLS Check Cashers offers 24/7 check cashing services.
description_long:
Located at 6470 S 12th Ave in Tucson, Arizona, PLS Check Cashers is a standalone check cashing location operating 24 hours a day, seven days a week. This Tucson storefront serves the community with convenient access to essential financial services throughout the day and night.

PLS Check Cashers at this Tucson, AZ location specializes in check cashing services for both personal and business checks. You can reach the location at +1 520-807-4500 to verify documents needed or ask about current services.

For residents of Tucson seeking immediate check cashing services, this location's 24/7 availability means you can deposit or cash checks at any time. Bring a valid government-issued photo ID, and the staff will process your check quickly. Whether you're in the area early morning or late night, this South 12th Ave location provides the financial services you need.
pros: Open 24/7 for all service categories including money, transportation, and business services
Offers vehicle registration, title transfers, and license plates as a DMV alternative
Ria Money Transfer available for international wire transfers
Xpectations! PLUS Prepaid Debit Mastercard with mobile app for unbanked customers
Notary services available in-store for wills, deeds, power of attorney, and more
Multi-state presence across 12 states providing consistency for relocating customers
Foreign currency exchange available alongside domestic financial services
cons: Fee schedules for check cashing and other services are not disclosed on the website
No loan, credit, or savings products offered — limited for building financial health
Services require physical branch visits; no apparent online or remote service options
Vehicle registration services may only be available in select states where PLS is licensed as an agent
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked individuals who need immediate check cashing without a bank account
Consumers needing vehicle registration or title transfers outside of DMV hours
Immigrant communities sending remittances abroad via Ria Money Transfer
Night-shift or weekend workers who need financial services outside standard banking hours
diagnosis: PLS is best suited for unbanked or underbanked consumers who need same-day check cashing, bill payment, or vehicle registration outside standard business hours. The 24/7 model and DMV-equivalent services are genuine differentiators, but the absence of published fees and no credit-building products mean it should be used for transactional convenience rather than as a path to financial improvement.
meta_description: PLS Check Cashers at 6470 S 12th Ave, Tucson, AZ. 24/7 check cashing services.
